description: CompositionCamel coloured sweatshirt made of 100% organic cotton with ribbing made of 95% organic cotton and 5% elastane, has a mock ribbed neck with a zippered chest placket, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, brand logo embroidered on the left chest and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry normalCool iron do not iron on decorationsDry cleanableGreat for your gym sessions or jogging, this stylish sweatshirt from timberland is a refreshing addition to your casual wardrobe. The soft organic cotton provides lightweight comfort and warmth and the stylish print gives you a strong sporty edge. Layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
